name: Geodesics & Length
description: Length space, geodesic, minimal geodesic. Hopf–Rinow. Length metric.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Length Lγ\nΣ d(x_i,x_{i+1})"]
    D2["Def: Length space\nd=inf Lγ"]
    D3["Def: Geodesic\nLγ = d endpoints"]
    D4["Def: Geodesic space\nany two joined"]
    T1["Thm: Hopf–Rinow\ncompl⇔geod complete"]
    T2["Thm: Minimizing segment\nexists in length sp"]
    T3["Thm: Compact⇒geodesic"]
    T4["Thm: Convex balls\nRiemannian"]
    T5["Thm: Midpoint property\ncharacterizes geodesic"]
    D1 --> D2
    D2 --> D3
    D3 --> D4
    D2 --> T1
    D3 --> T2
    T1 --> T3
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
